message:
test: integration test verifying Anthropic prompt caching

Makes two Complete calls with the same system prompt and tools, then
asserts cache_creation_input_tokens > 0 on turn 1 and
cache_read_input_tokens > 0 on turn 2. System prompt is padded above
the 4096-token minimum required by Haiku 4.5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
